invalid.divergence: Deliberate divergence: a useState seeded from a prop that the effect re-syncs to the same prop is the semi-controlled mirror shape (coreui CAlert, ant-design-mobile picker in the delta audit) - react-doctor exempts it here; the pure single-prop mirror is no-mirror-prop-effect's territory.

invalid.name: Reset all state to function call result when a prop changes
